title: API Gateway v2 Migration Plan — DRAFT
content_summary: Draft migration plan for API gateway v2 routing schema. Breaking change affecting Phoenix, Horizon, and Forge. No decision log yet — plan not finalized. Forge is unaware they have overlapping plans.
author: Fatima Al-Hassan

title: Decision: Real-time Pipeline Architecture
content_summary: Decision to adopt event-driven architecture for data pipeline v2. Replaces batch ETL. Horizon notification feed is primary consumer and must migrate.
author: Jordan Kim

decision_log.title: Adopt event-driven architecture for data pipeline v2
decision_log.decision: Replace batch ETL with event-driven pipeline using Kafka. All consumers must migrate to subscription model.
decision_log.rationale: Batch pipeline introduced 15-minute data lag causing poor UX for notifications. Real-time events eliminate this.
